in_state.L: left boundary: any artifact may back-propagate, see paths.anchor()
in_state.R: right boundary: receipt written to proof-receipts/<paper>/<tool>/
in_state.B: transport rule: T(P_in) -> P_out with receipt, residue never erased
in_state.W: workbook analogue: arity table printed by _boot, hydrator notes by hydrate

out_state.L: left boundary: any artifact may back-propagate, see paths.anchor()
out_state.R: right boundary: receipt written to proof-receipts/<paper>/<tool>/
out_state.B: transport rule: T(P_in) -> P_out with receipt, residue never erased
out_state.O: open obligations: complete Block A/B/C of the paper
out_state.W: workbook analogue: arity table printed by _boot, hydrator notes by hydrate
